title: Senior / Principal Consultant - Real-world Evidence (RWE)
description: Senior/Principal Consultant role in Signum's Nordic RWE team. Design and execute RWE projects using Nordic healthcare data (registries, EHRs). Support market access, launch prep, post-launch evidence. Requires MSc/PhD in epidemiology/biostatistics/public health, experience with RWD, pharma/consulting background, R/SAS/Stata/Python, project management, client engagement.
match_reasons: MSc with strong quantitative/statistical background|Experience with large healthcare datasets (Novo Nordisk single-cell RNA-seq)|Python/R statistical analysis skills|Pharma industry exposure (Novo Nordisk thesis)|Data pipeline development and validation
gaps: No RWE/epidemiology experience|No market access or HEOR background|No Nordic healthcare data experience (registries, EHRs)|Senior/Principal level vs. recent graduate|No consulting track record (3 months vs. 3-5+ years required)|No project leadership or proposal development experience
